new_terms.context: Variation in performance between GPUs with identical logical specs due to physical SM mapping.
Data transfer or communication between two separate silicon dies within the same package.
A microbenchmarking technique used to measure memory latency by traversing a linked list of pointers.
A matrix representing the latency or communication cost between different Streaming Multiprocessors.
Refers to physical hardware units (like SMs) that are functional and enabled after manufacturing binning.
Performance degradation caused by excessive simultaneous requests to the L2 cache.
